lemmas.conclusion: drop n (drop m xs) = drop (n + m) xs
lemmas.statement: drop n (drop m xs) = drop (n + m) xs

lemmas.body: drop n (drop (m + 0).succ (x :: xs)) = drop (n + m).succ (x :: xs)
lemmas.statement: (h1 : drop n (drop (m + 0).succ (x :: xs)) = drop (n + m).succ (x :: xs)) : drop n (drop (m + 1) (x :: xs)) = drop (n + (m + 1)) (x :: xs)

lemmas.statement: (h1 : drop n (drop m xs) = drop (n + m) xs) : drop n (drop (m + 1) (x :: xs)) = drop (n + (m + 1)) (x :: xs)

premises: ih : ∀ (xs : List α), drop n (drop m xs) = drop (n + m) xs
lemmas.statement: (ih : ∀ (xs : List α), drop n (drop m xs) = drop (n + m) xs) (xs : List α) : drop n (drop (m + 1) (x :: xs)) = drop (n + (m + 1)) (x :: xs)

lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (ih : ∀ (xs : List α), drop n (drop m xs) = drop (n + m) xs) (xs : List α) : drop n (drop (m + 1) xs) = drop (n + (m + 1)) xs
